title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at MyGlamm - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at MyGlamm - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MyGlamm! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MyGlamm:
MyGlamm is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MyGlamm!
